reviews.review_description:
Drunk Town Taxi Co. is an absolute blast—a hilariously chaotic indie arcade game where every passenger is three sheets to the wind. The physics are spot-on, and you’ll be laughing as your drunk clients flail around (or worse, fly out) when you take a corner too fast.
The real magic? Handbrake mastery. That little trick isn’t just for show—it’s your secret weapon to shaving seconds off your trips and earning bigger tips. And with endless replayability, every ride feels fresh.
Early access means there’s even more fun to come, but what’s here already? Pure gold. If you love wild rides, quirky humor, and arcade chaos, this is a must-try. Just don’t blame us if you miss your stop—those passengers are determined to get home! 🚗💨🍺

This is a nice, funny driving game. Nothing to be taken seriously, just having fun time driving a car with a drunk passenger on your side, hoping you don't lose him behind. Gameplay is smooth, nice graphics and great audio(burping!!!!)! I think this game is a solid base for future upgrades which could make this  experience becoming a must for hours of fun

reviews.review_title: Classic ‘one more game’ type of game
reviews.review_description:
Tbh i was apprehensive at first. I usually dont sit well with motion games but this one was surprisingly easy on the head.

The first play was a little wobbly, just like my drunk passenger. He keeps burping like crazy and its annoying i kept scolding the guy as I drove him to his destination.

The second try was better.

By the third, you start getting a hang of the steering. And get this urge to play one more game. I kept feeling i can beat my score. Went on to play like 5 games and got a high score of 950. I can see myself playing this for fun every once in a while. Great game. 

I felt good using the handbrake at each stop. Its a satisfying pull. If not for the handbreak, good luck stopping.

Overall fun and slightly addictive timed gameplay.

reviews.review_title: You actually get to drive the car
reviews.review_description: I really enjoyed the game and the fact that you actually get to drive the car and the passengers. It makes it even better that the game has physics and you can  hit other cars.
Fun, and vibrant taxi driving simulator, excellent for how recently it was made, love it
Really enjoyed chaos , drunk town is proper fun , cant wait for updates🤑🕺
